PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4200 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" } catch { Write-Output "failed to kill PID $\($_.OwningProcess\): $_" } } } else { Write-Output "no listener on 4200" })

PowerShell($dockerDesktop = Get-Process -Name 'Docker Desktop' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($null -eq $dockerDesktop\) { $exe = Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe'; if \(Test-Path $exe\) { Start-Process -FilePath $exe; "Docker Desktop launch initiated from $exe" } else { "Docker Desktop.exe not found at default location: $exe" } } else { "Docker Desktop already running \(PID $\($dockerDesktop.Id\)\)" })
